overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia running through a medieval village with timber-framed houses and cobblestone streets. The character moves from an open warehouse district through narrow alleys and busy streets before ascending a stone staircase. Bright sunlight casts strong shadows across the detailed game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with large wooden warehouse

agents.ego_description: Geralt runs through the village outskirts toward a large wooden warehouse building with circular decorations

entered.detail: tall wooden building with three large circular decorations on the facade
raised wooden platform with sacks and barrels
wooden wagon with large wheels parked near the platform
traditional medieval house with exposed wooden beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit village outskirts area with cobblestone ground and sparse grass. Geralt runs toward an imposing large wooden warehouse that dominates the center of the view, while timber-framed houses line the right side. A wooden loading platform with cargo sits on the left, and a few villagers are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between stone and timber buildings

events.description: turns left from open square into narrow shaded alleyway between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns left and runs through a narrow passage between stone buildings, passing a villager near a barrel

notable_agents.action: villager woman standing near a wooden barrel with her hand on her hip

entered.detail: weathered stone wall with small windows and a wooden door
tall stone wall casting deep shadows
rough stone wall of the adjacent building
heavy wooden door with iron hinges set in the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left into a narrow, shaded alleyway enclosed by high stone walls on both sides. The lighting becomes diffused as the buildings block the direct sunlight. A villager stands near a wooden barrel on the left as the character runs toward a bright archway exit visible at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: main village thoroughfare with shops and villagers

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider village street with increased pedestrian activity
approaches stone staircase leading to upper village level

agents.ego_description: Geralt runs through the busy village street passing villagers and domestic pigs roaming freely

notable_agents.action: pigs roaming and foraging on the cobblestone street
bearded villager in simple clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: mature oak tree with dense green foliage providing shade
wide stone staircase leading up to an archway
stone tunnel entrance at the base of the stairs
wooden building with open front displaying goods

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a wider village street bustling with activity. Villagers walk along the cobblestones while pigs roam freely near a large oak tree on the left. Geralt runs toward a prominent stone staircase in the distance, passing timber-framed shop fronts as the staircase gradually moves closer from the far center to the middle of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to upper village level

agents.ego_description: Geralt runs up the wide stone stairs toward the upper level of the village

entered.detail: stone balustrade with rounded tops along the left side of the stairs
stone balustrade with rounded tops along the right side of the stairs
stone archway entrance at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches and begins ascending the wide stone staircase that dominates the center of the frame. Stone railings flank both sides of the steps as the camera follows the character upward. The lower village falls behind as he climbs toward a stone archway gate visible at the top, with the staircase filling the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval village that transitions from open outskirts into narrow corridors before ascending toward a high stone gate. It begins with Geralt running across cobblestones and sparse grass toward a massive wooden warehouse, passing timber-framed houses and a cargo loading platform. As he turns left, the scene shifts into a shaded, narrow alleyway enclosed by high stone walls where the bright sunlight becomes diffused until the camera reaches a luminous archway exit. The environment then opens into a bustling village street filled with roaming pigs and pedestrians, moving past shop fronts and a large oak tree toward a distant set of stairs. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he ascends the wide stone staircase, leaving the lower village behind while climbing toward a stone archway gate at the summit.
